item.title: Spielberg on Being Repeatedly Turned Down to Direct a James Bond Film 摘要
item.description:
Steven Spielberg revealed in an interview that after the success of 'Jaws', he approached James Bond producer Cubby Broccoli to direct a Bond film but was turned down. After 'Close Encounters of the Third Kind', Broccoli asked to use the film's iconic five-note motif in 'Moonraker'. Spielberg offered permission in exchange for directing a Bond film, but Broccoli refused again. Spielberg granted permission anyway. The notes appear as a passcode in 'Moonraker'. Spielberg's rejection led him to collaborate with George Lucas on 'Raiders of the Lost Ark', which features Bond-like sequences.
标签: Steven Spielberg, James Bond, Cubby Broccoli, Close Encounters of the Third Kind, Moonraker, Raiders of the Lost Ark, film history, Easter egg, movie trivia, Indiana Jones
item.category: Close Encounters of the Third Kind

item.title: Apple: ‘Due to DMA, Siri AI Delayed in EU for iOS 27 and iPadOS 27’ 摘要
item.description:
Apple has publicly stated that the EU's Digital Markets Act (DMA) requires granting AI systems nearly unlimited device access, posing security risks like data theft and unauthorized actions. Apple proposed a Trusted System Agent intermediary to safely enable Siri AI features in the EU, but the European Commission rejected the plan. As a result, Apple has no timeline for releasing Siri AI on iOS and iPadOS in the EU, citing unresolved safety concerns and regulatory disagreements.
标签: Apple, Siri AI, DMA, European Commission, privacy, security, regulation, AI, iOS, iPadOS
